name: M365 Stale Service Principals
description: Identifies service principals (apps) that have not been used in 90 days
query: SELECT id, app_id, display_name, created_datetime, last_sign_in FROM entra_service_principals WHERE account_enabled = true AND (last_sign_in IS NULL OR last_sign_in < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Review stale service principals and disable or delete those no longer needed. Rotate credentials for active service principals.
